text.div:
Diabetes & Hypertension Care Plan

Patient: Casey Breadth-Tester — MRN BREADTH-0001

Plan owner: Dr. Sample Renderer, Breadth Test Medical Center Endocrinology

Problems Addressed

  • Type 2 diabetes mellitus without complication
  • Essential hypertension

Goals

  1. Hemoglobin A1c below 7.0% by 2026-03-31. Most recent value 7.8% (2025-11-04). Patient verbalizes understanding of carbohydrate counting and agrees to log meals in the clinic portal at least 5 days per week.
  2. Home blood pressure averaging below 130/80 mmHg. Patient was issued a validated home cuff on 2025-10-22 and instructed to measure twice daily, seated, after 5 minutes of rest, and to bring the log to every visit.
  3. Walk 30 minutes, 5 days per week. Patient prefers morning walks with spouse Jordan; podiatry cleared footwear on 2025-09-15.

Interventions

InterventionOwnerFrequency
Metformin titration per protocolDr. Sample RendererReview q3 months
Diabetes self-management educationPat Example, RN CDCES4-session series, started 2025-10-29
Nutrition consult — carbohydrate-consistent diet, sodium <2,300 mg/dayRiley Placeholder, RDInitial + 2 follow-ups
Annual dilated eye exam — referral sent to Breadth Test Eye AssociatesCare coordinationDue 2026-02-01
Depression screening (PHQ-9) at each quarterly visit; score 3 on 2025-11-04Clinic staffQuarterly

Patient Instructions

Call the clinic for fasting glucose repeatedly above 250 mg/dL, symptoms of hypoglycemia not resolving with 15 g fast-acting carbohydrate, or home blood pressure above 180/110 mmHg. After-hours nurse line: 555-555-0199. This plan was reviewed with the patient, who states her goals in her own words: "I want to be able to keep up with my grandkids and stay off insulin if I can."

Next review: 2026-02-03 with Dr. Sample Renderer.
